query: heavy film grain noise analog photograph high ISO texture
message: sub:film_artifacts/grain — anti_aesthetic — heavy grain, high-ISO noise, push-processed analog texture

response.objective_caption: An extreme close-up view showing a human nose with visible nostrils, part of a mustache, and lower facial features. The image captures skin texture and facial hair in intimate detail at very close range.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred, extremely close-up photograph of a human nose and partial mustache, rendered with such soft focus and magnification that features dissolve into indistinct flesh-toned masses, cropped so tightly that the subject becomes abstracted and fragmented beyond ordinary recognition.
